_convention: orthographic sphere; cx,cy,radius in native image px. Orientation q=[x,y,z,w] is a unit quaternion mapping body->camera; camera looks down -Z (+z_cam toward viewer); q=identity puts +Z (TOP) at camera. Body axes: +X=FRONT, -X=BACK, +Y=SIDE 1, -Y=SIDE 2, +Z=TOP, -Z=VALVE(South pole). Panels: 18-panel gnomonic spherical cube (6 faces x 3 strips, cyclic cut axes X->Z,Y->X,Z->Y; weave swaps chirality). Every seam is a cube straight line projected to the sphere (great-circle arc); watertight at width=1. strip = center-strip width (divider position along the cut axis); width = strip length (run half-extent; 1.0 = watertight cube, >1 extends strips past the cube edge).
